title: Debug derive leaks secret_key in logs
description: Any config struct with a secret_key field that derives Debug will print the key in plaintext when debug-logged. Must use manual Debug impl with [REDACTED]. Audit Broadside's structs with secret fields.
close_reason: Not vulnerable: WebhookConfig has manual Debug impl with [REDACTED]. Private keys stored as bare strings, never in Debug-derived structs. AppState has no Debug derive.
